TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kalpacaw nu yi-lang 2026 a mihcaan šľäśúóśąįÁą≠ (2026ŚĻī) nikalepacaw nu yi-lang nuyda u yi-lang atu pusewan nu dadipasan a kitidaan kyu mabakuhac kya itidaay malepacaw sat u . .2026 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 28 a demiad , amilika atu yi-se-ley maydih mibelin ku heni tu yi-lang yiselan a mikuwanay , mapulung maydih mikihatihatiya mubelin amibakuhac tina talakaway a tademaw u mikuwanay tapang mukeliday u hikuki balunga nu kaygung muhalhal tu sapamata amikuwang tu u cancanan a kitidaan amubelin tu satalakaway nu yi-lang mikuwanay ayda a tademaw ci Ali.hamini .2026ŚĻī2śúą28śó•, . u yi-lan nadikudan yadah t uku mubahelay a lacu atu kinapatay sananay inayay ku paculilay a hikuki a paculi , ,Yu mikusiw i cungtung a kitidaan nu amilika atu nu yiseley , ,yaitiniay katuuday nu bayu'ay a kanatal u cacukaymasan tu canan mamin a kusiwan mibaetung tu lacu baetungan nu yi-lang , imahini u yi-lang mibakuhac tu makayniay a balunga nu binawlan , ,u tatengaay sa mapuut kina he-mu-ce a kakaydaan nu mukuay tu simal a balunga . .Inani kalpacaw malalid ku liwliway katukuh li-huwan-te atu in-tu-yang a kitidaan , caay kasasulul mahida tu . . namakay 2023 a mihcaan sa , ina cung-tung mahini tu sakatalawan sa , u amilika atu yi-lang inayay kuni kasasulul mangaleb mangaleb .Ťá™2023 .Yi-lang atu yi-se-ley 2024 amihcaan atu 2025 a mihcaan kinapina mabakuhac masasuada ; i 2025 amihcaan 6 a bulad 12 a demiad kalwpacawan I mahini , u amilika ku mikuwanay tu yi-lang caay pacayi' mikakutud tu way namakayda i he hananay a kiyaku . . 2025 a mihcaan u cayay henay kabakuhac sa u tabakiay a nikacalilaw nu binawlan sipakayni i yiselan a mikuwanay maydih musumad tu mikuwanay kyu patalaw .2025 .tu cila a mihcaan , u yi-lang a siyhu patideng tu mipatayay a masakaputay itawya makaala tu emang ku tademaw nipatay nuheni tu paculiay a tademaw . .ni cuwanbu a siyhu sa 2 abulad atu yi-lang a siyhu namakayni i he hananay a kawaw masasudang i tini i aman a malungatu masasulul nika caay henay kakapah , ,sadikuda 2 abulad 28 a demiad u duma a masakaputay mapatideng se-s-nu-hu hanany malingatu a mubelih . .u kamu ni cuwan bu i tawya idaw ku sapilunguc . tina kawaw sapibakuhac tu mabahelay a lacu nu yi-lang atu hitay , a mipulu tu nikaala tu he-ce a dubu , sadikuday sa miedap tu binawlan makaala tu sapikuwan ngy masumad sa . .
S.PHON: kar~…ĺpa ¶aw nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč **** a mińß ¶aan **** (*****) nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč nujda u ji-r~…ĺaŇč atu pus…ôwan nu dadipasan a kitidaan kju mabakuńßa ¶ kja itidaaj mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw sat u . .**** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad , amir~…ĺika atu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ô majdińß mib…ôr~…ĺin ku ńß…ôni tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč jis…ôr~…ĺan a mikuwanaj , mapur~…ĺuŇč majdińß mikińßatińßatija mub…ôr~…ĺin amibakuńßa ¶ tina tar~…ĺakawaj a tad…ômaw u mikuwanaj tapaŇč muk…ôr~…ĺidaj u ńßikuki bar~…ĺuŇča nu kajguŇč muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu sapamata amikuwaŇč tu u ¶an ¶anan a kitidaan amub…ôr~…ĺin tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč mikuwanaj ajda a tad…ômaw ¶i ar~…ĺi.ńßamini .**********, . u ji-r~…ĺan nadikudan jadańß t uku mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶u atu kinapataj sananaj inajaj ku pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a ńßikuki a pa ¶ur~…ĺi , ,ju mikusiw i ¶uŇčtuŇč a kitidaan nu amir~…ĺika atu nu jis…ôr~…ĺ…ô , ,jaitiniaj katuudaj nu baju Ē~ °aj a kanatar~…ĺ u ¶a ¶ukajmasan tu ¶anan mamin a kusiwan miba…ôtuŇč tu r~…ĺa ¶u ba…ôtuŇčan nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč , imańßini u ji-r~…ĺaŇč mibakuńßa ¶ tu makajniaj a bar~…ĺuŇča nu binawr~…ĺan , ,u tat…ôŇčaaj sa mapuut kina ńß…ô-mu- ¶…ô a kakajdaan nu mukuaj tu simar~…ĺ a bar~…ĺuŇča . .inani kar~…ĺpa ¶aw mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj katukuńß r~…ĺi-ńßuwan-t…ô atu in-tu-jaŇč a kitidaan , ¶aaj kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ mańßida tu . . namakaj **** a mińß ¶aan sa , ina ¶uŇč-tuŇč mańßini tu sakatar~…ĺawan sa , u amir~…ĺika atu ji-r~…ĺaŇč inajaj kuni kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb .***** .ji-r~…ĺaŇč atu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ô **** amińß ¶aan atu **** a mińß ¶aan kinapina mabakuńßa ¶ masasuada ; i **** amińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad kar~…ĺwpa ¶awan i mańßini , u amir~…ĺika ku mikuwanaj tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj pa ¶aji Ē~ ° mikakutud tu waj namakajda i ńß…ô ńßananaj a kijaku . . **** a mińß ¶aan u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj kabakuńßa ¶ sa u tabakiaj a nika ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw nu binawr~…ĺan sipakajni i jis…ôr~…ĺan a mikuwanaj majdińß musumad tu mikuwanaj kju patar~…ĺaw .**** .tu ¶ir~…ĺa a mińß ¶aan , u ji-r~…ĺaŇč a sijńßu patid…ôŇč tu mipatajaj a masakaputaj itawja makaar~…ĺa tu …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw nipataj nuńß…ôni tu pa ¶ur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw . .ni ¶uwanbu a sijńßu sa * abur~…ĺad atu ji-r~…ĺaŇč a sijńßu namakajni i ńß…ô ńßananaj a kawaw masasudaŇč i tini i aman a mar~…ĺuŇčatu masasur~…ĺur~…ĺ nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kakapańß , ,sadikuda * abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad u duma a masakaputaj mapatid…ôŇč s…ô-s-nu-ńßu ńßananj mar~…ĺiŇčatu a mub…ôr~…ĺińß . .u kamu ni ¶uwan bu i tawja idaw ku sapir~…ĺuŇču ¶ . tina kawaw sapibakuńßa ¶ tu mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶u nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč atu ńßitaj , a mipur~…ĺu tu nikaar~…ĺa tu ńß…ô- ¶…ô a dubu , sadikudaj sa mi…ôdap tu binawr~…ĺan makaar~…ĺa tu sapikuwan Ňčj masumad sa . .
S.FORM: kalpacaw nu yi-lang 2026 a mihcaan šľäśúóśąįÁą≠ (2026ŚĻī) nikalepacaw nu yi-lang nuyda u yi-lang atu pusewan nu dadipasan a kitidaan kyu mabakuhac kya itidaay malepacaw sat u . .2026 a mihcaan 2 a bulad 28 a demiad , amilika atu yi-se-ley maydih mibelin ku heni tu yi-lang yiselan a mikuwanay , mapulung maydih mikihatihatiya mubelin amibakuhac tina talakaway a tademaw u mikuwanay tapang mukeliday u hikuki balunga nu kaygung muhalhal tu sapamata amikuwang tu u cancanan a kitidaan amubelin tu satalakaway nu yi-lang mikuwanay ayda a tademaw ci Ali.hamini .2026ŚĻī2śúą28śó•, . u yi-lan nadikudan yadah t uku mubahelay a lacu atu kinapatay sananay inayay ku paculilay a hikuki a paculi , ,Yu mikusiw i cungtung a kitidaan nu amilika atu nu yiseley , ,yaitiniay katuuday nu bayu'ay a kanatal u cacukaymasan tu canan mamin a kusiwan mibaetung tu lacu baetungan nu yi-lang , imahini u yi-lang mibakuhac tu makayniay a balunga nu binawlan , ,u tatengaay sa mapuut kina he-mu-ce a kakaydaan nu mukuay tu simal a balunga . .Inani kalpacaw malalid ku liwliway katukuh li-huwan-te atu in-tu-yang a kitidaan , caay kasasulul mahida tu . . namakay 2023 a mihcaan sa , ina cung-tung mahini tu sakatalawan sa , u amilika atu yi-lang inayay kuni kasasulul mangaleb mangaleb .Ťá™2023 .Yi-lang atu yi-se-ley 2024 amihcaan atu 2025 a mihcaan kinapina mabakuhac masasuada ; i 2025 amihcaan 6 a bulad 12 a demiad kalwpacawan I mahini , u amilika ku mikuwanay tu yi-lang caay pacayi' mikakutud tu way namakayda i he hananay a kiyaku . . 2025 a mihcaan u cayay henay kabakuhac sa u tabakiay a nikacalilaw nu binawlan sipakayni i yiselan a mikuwanay maydih musumad tu mikuwanay kyu patalaw .2025 .tu cila a mihcaan , u yi-lang a siyhu patideng tu mipatayay a masakaputay itawya makaala tu emang ku tademaw nipatay nuheni tu paculiay a tademaw . .ni cuwanbu a siyhu sa 2 abulad atu yi-lang a siyhu namakayni i he hananay a kawaw masasudang i tini i aman a malungatu masasulul nika caay henay kakapah , ,sadikuda 2 abulad 28 a demiad u duma a masakaputay mapatideng se-s-nu-hu hanany malingatu a mubelih . .u kamu ni cuwan bu i tawya idaw ku sapilunguc . tina kawaw sapibakuhac tu mabahelay a lacu nu yi-lang atu hitay , a mipulu tu nikaala tu he-ce a dubu , sadikuday sa miedap tu binawlan makaala tu sapikuwan ngy masumad sa . .
S.PHON: kar~…ĺpa ¶aw nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč **** a mińß ¶aan **** (*****) nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč nujda u ji-r~…ĺaŇč atu pus…ôwan nu dadipasan a kitidaan kju mabakuńßa ¶ kja itidaaj mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw sat u . .**** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad , amir~…ĺika atu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ô majdińß mib…ôr~…ĺin ku ńß…ôni tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč jis…ôr~…ĺan a mikuwanaj , mapur~…ĺuŇč majdińß mikińßatińßatija mub…ôr~…ĺin amibakuńßa ¶ tina tar~…ĺakawaj a tad…ômaw u mikuwanaj tapaŇč muk…ôr~…ĺidaj u ńßikuki bar~…ĺuŇča nu kajguŇč muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu sapamata amikuwaŇč tu u ¶an ¶anan a kitidaan amub…ôr~…ĺin tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč mikuwanaj ajda a tad…ômaw ¶i ar~…ĺi.ńßamini .**********, . u ji-r~…ĺan nadikudan jadańß t uku mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶u atu kinapataj sananaj inajaj ku pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a ńßikuki a pa ¶ur~…ĺi , ,ju mikusiw i ¶uŇčtuŇč a kitidaan nu amir~…ĺika atu nu jis…ôr~…ĺ…ô , ,jaitiniaj katuudaj nu baju Ē~ °aj a kanatar~…ĺ u ¶a ¶ukajmasan tu ¶anan mamin a kusiwan miba…ôtuŇč tu r~…ĺa ¶u ba…ôtuŇčan nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč , imańßini u ji-r~…ĺaŇč mibakuńßa ¶ tu makajniaj a bar~…ĺuŇča nu binawr~…ĺan , ,u tat…ôŇčaaj sa mapuut kina ńß…ô-mu- ¶…ô a kakajdaan nu mukuaj tu simar~…ĺ a bar~…ĺuŇča . .inani kar~…ĺpa ¶aw mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj katukuńß r~…ĺi-ńßuwan-t…ô atu in-tu-jaŇč a kitidaan , ¶aaj kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ mańßida tu . . namakaj **** a mińß ¶aan sa , ina ¶uŇč-tuŇč mańßini tu sakatar~…ĺawan sa , u amir~…ĺika atu ji-r~…ĺaŇč inajaj kuni kasasur~…ĺur~…ĺ maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb .***** .ji-r~…ĺaŇč atu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ô **** amińß ¶aan atu **** a mińß ¶aan kinapina mabakuńßa ¶ masasuada ; i **** amińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad kar~…ĺwpa ¶awan i mańßini , u amir~…ĺika ku mikuwanaj tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj pa ¶aji Ē~ ° mikakutud tu waj namakajda i ńß…ô ńßananaj a kijaku . . **** a mińß ¶aan u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj kabakuńßa ¶ sa u tabakiaj a nika ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw nu binawr~…ĺan sipakajni i jis…ôr~…ĺan a mikuwanaj majdińß musumad tu mikuwanaj kju patar~…ĺaw .**** .tu ¶ir~…ĺa a mińß ¶aan , u ji-r~…ĺaŇč a sijńßu patid…ôŇč tu mipatajaj a masakaputaj itawja makaar~…ĺa tu …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw nipataj nuńß…ôni tu pa ¶ur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw . .ni ¶uwanbu a sijńßu sa * abur~…ĺad atu ji-r~…ĺaŇč a sijńßu namakajni i ńß…ô ńßananaj a kawaw masasudaŇč i tini i aman a mar~…ĺuŇčatu masasur~…ĺur~…ĺ nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kakapańß , ,sadikuda * abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad u duma a masakaputaj mapatid…ôŇč s…ô-s-nu-ńßu ńßananj mar~…ĺiŇčatu a mub…ôr~…ĺińß . .u kamu ni ¶uwan bu i tawja idaw ku sapir~…ĺuŇču ¶ . tina kawaw sapibakuńßa ¶ tu mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶u nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč atu ńßitaj , a mipur~…ĺu tu nikaar~…ĺa tu ńß…ô- ¶…ô a dubu , sadikudaj sa mi…ôdap tu binawr~…ĺan makaar~…ĺa tu sapikuwan Ňčj masumad sa . .
